title: User-controlled tuning of handstate representation model parameters
abstract: Methods and apparatus for enabling a user or third-party to adjust one or more parameters of one or more statistical models used to generate a musculoskeletal representation. The method comprises providing as input to the one or more statistical models, a plurality of neuromuscular signals recorded by a plurality of neuromuscular sensors during performance of at least one gesture by a user, wherein the at least one gesture is performed by the user while wearing a wearable device having the plurality of neuromuscular sensors arranged thereon, rendering at least one visual representation based on an output of the one or more statistical models, and receiving user or third-party input to adjust one or more parameters of the one or more statistical models based on the rendered at least one visual representation, the user input including a selection of a particular statistical model of the one or more statistical models and/or an adjustment of parameters associated with the particular statistical model.
